data_window: 2026-06-05 10:17 to 2026-06-08 10:17 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub topic/repository pages and AI Native Landscape pages for recently updated or newly visible AI agent, MCP, RAG, workflow, browser/code/assistant automation repositories.
source_summary: Live GitHub Topic pages, GitHub repository README pages, and AI Native Landscape. Local gh was unavailable and shell curl to GitHub failed because 127.0.0.1:7890 proxy was not reachable; no clone/run audit was performed.
trend_observations: AI coding-agent products are moving from single-agent execution toward multi-agent control planes; MCP opportunity is shifting toward debugging, eval, OAuth, gateway, and governance tooling; always-on agent platforms emphasize identity, triggers, browser runtime, and durable operations; memory/context layers are splitting into personal memory, code graph context, and session intelligence.
assumptions: Prioritized product-shaped repositories with runnable UI/CLI/API, explicit user scenarios, documentation, demos/examples/screenshots, and visible page-level activity. Pure guides, prompt/template collections, awesome lists, paper/benchmark repos, and marketing-only shells were downgraded. Growth signals are qualitative page observations and should be API-verified before investment decisions.
markdown_report:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-08

数据窗口：2026-06-05 10:17 至 2026-06-08 10:17（Asia/Shanghai）。重点查看 GitHub Topic 最近更新列表、仓库 README、可运行入口、demo/screenshots、stars/forks/issues/PR/commits 等页面信号。

关键假设：本地 `gh` 不可用，shell 侧 `curl` 被本机 `127.0.0.1:7890` 代理配置阻断；本轮使用实时 GitHub/AI Native Landscape 网页审计，没有 clone 或实际运行仓库。分数偏向真实产品形态、可运行 UI/CLI/API、文档完整度、近期活跃和可复刻价值；纯指南、模板、awesome list、论文/benchmark、低代码空壳项目降权。

## Top Projects

1. shep-ai/shep - Coding Agent Control Plane - Score 89
   - GitHub: https://github.com/shep-ai/shep
   - 做什么：用 CLI + Web Dashboard 管理多个 AI coding agent 并行开发，每个任务独立 worktree，可自动 commit、push、开 PR、看 CI、失败重试。
   - 面向谁：同时跑 Claude Code、Cursor CLI、Gemini CLI 等 coding agent 的工程团队和独立开发者。
   - AI native 点：产品核心不是写代码本身，而是把多个 agent 的执行生命周期、隔离、审计和 PR 流程产品化。
   - 增长/活跃信号：仓库页显示约 203 stars、31 forks、1,026 commits、63 issues、33 PR；README 有 Shep Cloud、localhost dashboard、CLI、CI auto-fix 等完整产品叙事。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 `npx @shepai/cli`、`npm i -g @shepai/cli`，本地启动 `shep` 打开 `localhost:4050`，具备截图和命令示例；未实际运行。
   - 建议动作：高优先级复刻拆解，重点看 worktree 隔离、agent session 状态机、CI 失败回收和 PR 审批边界。

2. MCPJam/inspector - MCP Debugging / Evaluation Platform - Score 87
   - GitHub: https://github.com/MCPJam/inspector
   - 做什么：面向 MCP servers、MCP apps、ChatGPT apps 的调试、检查、聊天、OAuth、eval、CI/CD 平台。
   - 面向谁：开发和维护 MCP server/app 的工程师、agent 工具团队、平台团队。
   - AI native 点：把 MCP tool/resource/prompt、JSON-RPC trace、OAuth、模型聊天和 eval 放进同一个开发工作台。
   - 增长/活跃信号：仓库页显示约 2k stars、237 forks、3,814 commits、45 issues、56 PR；MCP server Topic 页显示 2026-06-02 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：提供 hosted app、desktop app、`npx @mcpjam/inspector@latest`、Docker 四条路径；README 有 demo、CLI、SDK、CI 说明。
   - 建议动作：作为 MCP 开发工具链标杆，优先试用 hosted/npx 路径，提炼“trace + eval + OAuth debugger”产品模块。

3. dcSpark/shinkai-local-ai-agents - Local No-code Agent Builder - Score 84
   - GitHub: https://github.com/dcSpark/shinkai-local-ai-agents
   - 做什么：两步安装的本地 AI agent 应用，用可视化方式创建本地/远程模型 agent，支持 MCP、加密支付和多 agent 协作。
   - 面向谁：想在本地创建 agent workflow、自动化、个人/团队 assistant 的非专业和半专业用户。
   - AI native 点：agent builder、多 agent orchestration、MCP、local-first、payments/crypto 共同构成产品体验。
   - 增长/活跃信号：mcp-agents Topic 页显示约 427 stars，2026-06-05 更新；README 强调 demo、examples、release 下载和跨平台桌面应用。
   - 可运行性判断：提供 release 下载、一键安装、Tauri desktop、React UI、NX monorepo；未实际运行。
   - 建议动作：放入“local agent app + MCP + no-code builder”观察线，重点验证安装包成熟度和真实 agent 模板质量。

4. gobii-ai/gobii-platform - Always-on AI Workforce Platform - Score 83
   - GitHub: https://github.com/gobii-ai/gobii-platform
   - 做什么：面向团队的 always-on AI coworker 平台，支持 schedule/event 唤醒、真实浏览器操作、webhook、agent 身份、邮件/SMS 入口和 agent-to-agent 协作。
   - 面向谁：希望把 agent 放进生产工作流、自动触发、持续运行的团队和业务自动化开发者。
   - AI native 点：持久 agent、身份、事件队列、浏览器 runtime、密钥/代理/sandbox 控制是核心产品结构。
   - 增长/活跃信号：仓库页显示约 447 stars；README 展示 hosted product、自托管平台、Docker Compose、API quick start 和 production use cases。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 `curl -fsSL https://gobii.ai/install.sh | bash`、`docker compose up --build`、`localhost:8000` 设置；未实际运行。
   - 建议动作：作为“团队级长时运行 agent”样本，拆解 agent identity、schedule/event trigger、browser-use API 兼容层。

5. blackwell-systems/knowing - Code Intelligence MCP / Agent Context Layer - Score 81
   - GitHub: https://github.com/blackwell-systems/knowing
   - 做什么：为 AI coding agent 提供代码关系图、上下文检索、blast radius、test scope、Merkle proof 和 supply-chain audit。
   - 面向谁：大型代码库、平台工程、安全审计、希望减少 agent grep/read 循环的开发团队。
   - AI native 点：agent 通过 MCP 直接查询图谱上下文，系统会随代码变化自动失效旧知识，并输出可验证关系证明。
   - 增长/活跃信号：仓库页显示约 10 stars、1,981 commits；MCP server Topic 页显示 2026-06-02 更新，README 给出 28 MCP tools、38 edge types、benchmark 和多语言 extractors。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 Homebrew、npm、pip、go install，MCP stdio/HTTP 配置完整；未实际运行。
   - 建议动作：列入 coding-agent context plane 复刻候选，优先小仓库验证 `context_for_task`、`blast_radius`、`test_scope`。

6. ictechgy/light_terminal - Agent Terminal Session Daemon - Score 79
   - GitHub: https://github.com/ictechgy/light_terminal
   - 做什么：为 AI coding agent 提供 tmux-compatible 持久 PTY session daemon，支持 Claude、Codex、Gemini、Cursor、Aider、Goose 等 launchers。
   - 面向谁：需要远程/移动查看 agent session、保持终端状态、兼容 tmux/cmux 的开发者。
   - AI native 点：把 agent 运行环境、日志、等待、通知、进程树和 tmux shim 做成稳定 CLI substrate。
   - 增长/活跃信号：ai-agents Topic 页显示约 4 stars，2026-06-03 更新；README 提供 Homebrew、npm、Cargo、smoke test、agent launcher 列表和公共命令契约。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 `brew install ictechgy/tap/lterm`、`npm install -g @ictechgy/lterm`、`cargo install`；未实际运行。
   - 建议动作：作为 agent terminal/runtime substrate 小样本，观察是否能补足 Codex/Claude 长任务会话管理。

7. gambletan/cortex - Local Personal Agent Memory Engine - Score 77
   - GitHub: https://github.com/gambletan/cortex
   - 做什么：本地优先的个人 AI agent memory engine，强调 AES-256-GCM、LoCoMo 分数、快速 ingest、本地数据库和自有云同步。
   - 面向谁：个人 assistant、IM agent、长期记忆型 agent app 开发者。
   - AI native 点：把 episodic/semantic/preference memory、身份解析、检索和 MCP server 作为 agent 的长期记忆层。
   - 增长/活跃信号：MCP server Topic 页显示约 15 stars，2026-06-02 更新；README 有 Rust API、Homebrew、source build 和本地隐私叙事。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 `brew install cortex-mcp-server` 和源码构建；更偏 library/MCP infra，产品 UI 尚弱。
   - 建议动作：加入 memory layer watchlist，和 supermemory/mem0/本地记忆方案对比 API 边界。

8. AgentStaqAI/agentgate - MCP Zero-trust Gateway - Score 75
   - GitHub: https://github.com/AgentStaqAI/agentgate
   - 做什么：MCP 的零信任防火墙和协议桥，代理 MCP traffic，做 allowlist、策略拦截、audit log、HITL approval。
   - 面向谁：把 MCP server 接入生产 agent 的平台/安全/DevOps 团队。
   - AI native 点：解决 agent tool calling 的权限、审计、人工审批和协议桥接问题，是 agent 上生产的治理层。
   - 增长/活跃信号：mcp-agents Topic 页列为 2026 年内活跃项目；README 有 Go binary、install script、Homebrew、配置示例和 HITL 截图。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 one-liner、Homebrew、源码构建，配置样例明确；stars 信号较弱，需验证维护节奏。
   - 建议动作：作为 MCP gateway 安全样本保留，后续和 ToolHive、mcpproxy-go、MCPJam 的治理/调试边界对比。

## Watchlist

- 20alexl/claude-engram - Coding Agent Memory - Score 72 - https://github.com/20alexl/claude-engram - 方向是 Claude Code hook + session intelligence + cross-session search，适合观察 agent memory 是否从工具库走向产品；需要确认跨 agent 支持和安装路径。
- chunxiaoxx/nautilus-compass - Multi-agent Reliability Layer - Score 71 - https://github.com/chunxiaoxx/nautilus-compass - 方向是 cross-dialog contracts、drift detection、black-box memory，不依赖 LLM extraction；需要验证 README 之外是否有稳定 CLI/API。
- moiraweave-labs/moiraweave-cli - Agent Ops CLI - Score 68 - https://github.com/moiraweave-labs/moiraweave-cli - ai-agents Topic 显示为本地 startup、workload templates、runs、agent sessions、deployment flows；0 star 且更新信号偏早，先观察。
- blackwell-systems/knowing - Code Graph Context Layer - Score 81 - https://github.com/blackwell-systems/knowing - 已进 Top，但 adoption 很早；建议在小仓库做一次实际 MCP 工具调用后再提高优先级。

## Skip Reasons

- zebbern/claude-code-guide：https://github.com/zebbern/claude-code-guide - 4.2k stars 且 2026-06-07 更新，但主要是 Claude Code guide/commands/workflows/skills 文档集合，不是可运行产品。
- shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice：https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice - stars 异常高，定位更像 best practice/agentic engineering 内容页，缺少清晰产品运行面。
- thinkwee/AgentsMeetRL：https://github.com/thinkwee/AgentsMeetRL - Agentic RL awesome list，偏资料索引，不符合产品形态优先标准。
- Gudvin82/vibe-coding-protocols：https://github.com/Gudvin82/vibe-coding-protocols - 有实用模板价值，但本轮判定为 markdown protocol/template collection。

## 今日趋势观察

1. AI coding agent 生态正在从“单 agent 写代码”转向“多 agent 执行控制面”：worktree、PR、CI、日志、恢复、审批变成核心产品面。
2. MCP 的机会从 server 数量增长转向开发者工具和治理工具：inspector、eval、OAuth debugger、gateway、HITL、audit log 会逐渐标配。
3. 长时运行 agent 产品正在强调身份和触发器：email/SMS/webhook/schedule/event queue 让 agent 更像“可联系的数字同事”。
4. Agent memory/context 层出现分化：个人记忆、代码图谱上下文、session mistake mining 是不同赛道，短期更适合作为基础设施试验。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先试跑 Shep：验证 `npx @shepai/cli`、dashboard、worktree/PR/CI loop 是否真能闭环。
- 用 MCPJam Inspector 调试一个本地 MCP server，把 trace/eval/OAuth debugger 的产品模块拆成可复刻清单。
- 为 Gobii 建一张“always-on agent 平台”卡片，重点看 agent identity、schedule/event trigger、browser task API。
- 选 knowing 或 cortex 做一个 30 分钟小实验，确认 memory/context 层和本地 Codex 工作流的结合点。

## 信息来源

- GitHub Topic: https://github.com/topics/ai-agents?o=desc&s=updated
- GitHub Topic: https://github.com/topics/mcp-agents
- GitHub Topic: https://github.com/topics/mcp-server?o=desc&s=updated
- AI Native Landscape: https://landscape.jimmysong.io/
- 项目仓库 README/页面：shep-ai/shep、MCPJam/inspector、dcSpark/shinkai-local-ai-agents、gobii-ai/gobii-platform、blackwell-systems/knowing、ictechgy/light_terminal、gambletan/cortex、AgentStaqAI/agentgate。

top_projects.summary: CLI and web dashboard for running multiple AI coding agents in isolated worktrees with commits, pushes, PRs, CI watching, and retries.
top_projects.audience: Engineering teams and solo developers running Claude Code, Cursor CLI, Gemini CLI, or similar coding agents in parallel.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: It productizes the execution lifecycle around many agents: isolation, state, audit trail, PR flow, CI feedback, and recovery.
top_projects.growth_signal: Repository page showed about 203 stars, 31 forks, 1,026 commits, 63 issues, and 33 PRs, with a complete product README and cloud/local paths.
top_projects.runnability: Provides npx and npm CLI install paths plus a local dashboard at localhost:4050; no clone/run audit performed.
top_projects.recommended_action: Run a focused local trial and decompose worktree isolation, agent state machine, CI auto-fix, and PR approval flow.

top_projects.summary: Development platform for debugging, inspecting, chatting with, evaluating, and CI-testing MCP servers, MCP apps, and ChatGPT apps.
top_projects.audience: Engineers and platform teams building or maintaining MCP servers and agent tool integrations.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: MCP tools/resources/prompts, JSON-RPC traces, OAuth debugging, model chat, evals, CLI, SDK, and CI are unified in one agent-development workspace.
top_projects.growth_signal: Repository page showed about 2k stars, 237 forks, 3,814 commits, 45 issues, and 56 PRs; MCP server topic listed it as updated on 2026-06-02.
top_projects.runnability: Hosted app, desktop app, npx CLI, and Docker paths are documented; no local run audit performed.
top_projects.recommended_action: Use it to debug one local MCP server and extract a reproducible trace/eval/OAuth debugger product checklist.

top_projects.summary: Local-first no-code AI agent app for creating local/remote model agents with MCP support, multi-agent collaboration, and payments/crypto workflows.
top_projects.audience: Users and builders who want local agent workflows, automation, personal assistants, or team assistants without writing much code.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Agent builder, multi-agent orchestration, MCP, local-first runtime, and payments/crypto are all part of the product surface.
top_projects.growth_signal: mcp-agents topic page showed about 427 stars and an update on 2026-06-05; README includes demo, examples, release downloads, and desktop architecture.
top_projects.runnability: Release download and one-click install path are documented; repo is a Tauri/React/NX monorepo; no run audit performed.
top_projects.recommended_action: Track as a local agent app plus MCP plus no-code builder sample and verify install package maturity.

top_projects.summary: Self-hostable always-on AI coworker platform with schedules, events, browser tasks, webhooks, agent identity, email/SMS entry points, and agent-to-agent coordination.
top_projects.audience: Teams and automation builders that want production agents to run continuously and be contactable like coworkers.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Durable agents, identity, event queues, browser runtime, secrets, proxy control, and sandboxing form the product architecture.
top_projects.growth_signal: Repository page showed about 447 stars and a detailed README covering hosted product, Docker self-hosting, API quick start, and production use cases.
top_projects.runnability: Supports hosted installer, manual git clone plus docker compose, and localhost setup; no local run audit performed.
top_projects.recommended_action: Create a long-running-agent platform card focused on identity, schedule/event triggers, and browser-use API compatibility.

top_projects.category: Code Intelligence MCP / Agent Context Layer
top_projects.summary: Code relationship graph and MCP context engine for AI coding agents, with blast radius, test scope, Merkle proofs, and supply-chain audit.
top_projects.audience: Large-codebase teams, platform engineers, security auditors, and agent-tool builders reducing grep/read loops.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Agents call MCP tools to retrieve graph-ranked code context, blast radius, and test scope while stale knowledge expires as code changes.
top_projects.growth_signal: Repository page showed about 10 stars and 1,981 commits; MCP server topic listed it as updated on 2026-06-02, with README benchmarks, 28 MCP tools, and 38 edge types.
top_projects.runnability: Homebrew, npm, pip, go install, MCP stdio, and HTTP setup are documented; no run audit performed.
top_projects.recommended_action: Run a small-repo trial of context_for_task, blast_radius, and test_scope before raising confidence.

top_projects.summary: tmux-compatible persistent PTY session daemon and CLI substrate for AI coding agents.
top_projects.audience: Developers who need persistent terminal sessions, remote/mobile review, and compatibility shims for many coding agents.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Agent execution environment, logs, waits, notifications, process tree inspection, and tmux/cmux compatibility are treated as product features.
top_projects.growth_signal: ai-agents topic page showed about 4 stars and an update on 2026-06-03; README includes install paths, smoke tests, launchers, and public command contract.

top_projects.summary: Local-first memory engine for personal AI agents with encrypted storage, identity resolution, retrieval, and MCP server positioning.

top_projects.ai_native_angle: Episodic, semantic, and preference memory become reusable local agent infrastructure.
top_projects.growth_signal: MCP server topic page showed about 15 stars and an update on 2026-06-02; README emphasizes local privacy, Rust API, Homebrew, and source build.

top_projects.runnability: One-liner, Homebrew, and source build are documented; star signal is weak and maintenance cadence needs verification.
top_projects.recommended_action: Keep as an MCP security sample and compare against ToolHive, mcpproxy-go, and MCPJam boundaries.

watchlist.ai_native_angle: Session traces become reusable agent memory and prediction signals.
watchlist.growth_signal: Repository appeared in current MCP/agent discovery pass with product-like memory positioning.
watchlist.runnability: Needs follow-up verification of install path, cross-agent support, and hook robustness.
watchlist.recommended_action: Watch and audit if it supports non-Claude agents cleanly.

watchlist.ai_native_angle: Agent coordination and drift control become explicit runtime infrastructure.
watchlist.growth_signal: Repository surfaced in current multi-agent reliability discovery pass.
watchlist.runnability: Needs verification of CLI/API maturity beyond README positioning.

watchlist.summary: Command-line entry point for MoiraWeave startup, workload templates, runs, agent sessions, and deployment flows.

watchlist.summary: Code graph context engine for AI agents; included in Top but adoption is still early.

skipped_projects.skip_reason: 4.2k stars and updated on 2026-06-07, but primarily a Claude Code guide/commands/workflows/skills document collection rather than a runnable product.
Very high star signal but positioned as best-practice/agentic-engineering content, with insufficient runnable product surface.
